code:
%%{HealthTech_PatientRecords}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] state Pending {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] } state Approved {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为医疗科技的患者评论系统设计一个状态流转图。核心场景是：LabAnalyzer设备创建评论后，评论需要经过审核才能对外可见。我想把Pending作为初始状态，从这里分出批准、拒绝和删除三条路径。
明白了。Pending状态内部需要细化审核流程吗？比如DiagnosticEngine介入后，是否需要先进入AwaitingModeration子状态，再同步到EMR系统？
对，Pending状态内部要有这个层次。DiagnosticEngine触发审核，评论进入AwaitingModeration，完成后流转到EMR_Sync节点。另外Approved状态也要内部细化——评论可见后应该支持编辑，编辑完再回到可见状态。
好的，我来画一下。Pending和Approved都展开成复合状态。Rejected状态我也需要处理，被拒绝的评论应该是隐藏的，而且需要记录拒绝原因，最后归档到HIPAA_Vault。
删除的逻辑也要明确：从Pending、Approved、Rejected这三个状态都可以直接删除，删除后的评论要回到LabAnalyzer做最终清理。另外每个主状态旁边最好加上注释说明。
确认一下删除的流转：Pending、Approved、Rejected都能触发Delete动作，最终汇聚到Deleted状态，然后返回LabAnalyzer。注释我会分别加在Pending、Approved、Rejected、Deleted四个状态右侧。
Rejected那里的流转需要调整一下。应该是Hidden先流转到WithReason状态来添加拒绝原因，然后再进入HIPAA_Vault，而不是直接从Hidden跳到Vault。
已修正。现在Rejected内部是：DiagnosticEngine先到Hidden，然后Add Rejection Reason到WithReason，最后进入HIPAA_Vault。整体结构已经完整，包含四个主状态及其内部流转，以及删除的统一出口。
